title: Russian oil tanker reaches Cuba after Trump appears to loosen blockade
headline: Russian oil tanker reaches Cuba after Trump appears to loosen blockade
deck: The tanker has reached Cuban waters just hours after Donald Trump said he had "no problem" with it.
